vw_td_ebi_region_rpt.description: Reporting view for geographic/sales regions, territories, and rep assignments.

REP_ID.description: sales rep identifier (replaces EMP_ID from base table)

GLOBAL_REGION.description: top-level geo; valid filtering candidates in vw_td_ebi_region_rpt: AMERICAS, EMEA, APAC, WW

IS_TRUE_FLM.description: flag for true First Line Manager

IS_TRUE_SLM.description: flag for true Second Line Manager

IS_TRUE_TLM.description: flag for true Third Line Manager

vw_TF_EBI_P2S.description: Fact table for Pipeline-to-Sales (P2S) conversion metrics. Central fact table used for most pipeline and booking analyses.

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

CREATOR_TYPE_ID.description: creator type identifier, links to vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE

DEAL_TYPE_ID.description: deal type identifier, links to TD_EBI_DEAL_TYPE

OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID.description: opportunity close date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

OPP_CREATE_DATE_ID.description: opportunity create date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID.description: snapshot date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

DERIVED_CLOSURE_DATE_ID.description: derived closure date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

ORIGINAL_REGION_ID.description: original region identifier, links to vw_td_ebi_region_rpt

DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED.description: days since next steps were last modified

DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED_BAND.description: days since next steps modified band

DEAL_AGE.description: age of the deal in days

IN_PIPELINE.description: flag: 1 if deal is in pipeline

STAGE_AGE.description: number of days in current stage

AE_REGION_ID.description: AE region identifier, links to vw_td_ebi_region_rpt

OPG_ARR_AVG_USD_CURR_FY.description: OPG ARR average USD for current FY

UCP_ICP_SCORE_ID.description: UCP/ICP score identifier, links to vw_TD_ICP_UCP_SCORES

ROLE_COVERAGE_ID.description: role coverage identifier, links to vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage

vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA.description: Quota and target data by territory and time period.

PIPE_TARGET_SURVIVAL_RATE_SS5.description: pipeline target survival rate at SS5

PIPE_TARGET_SURVIVAL_RATE_SS4.description: pipeline target survival rate at SS4

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

QUOTA_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID.description: fiscal quarter date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID.description: snapshot date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

DEAL_TYPE_ID.description: deal type identifier, links to TD_EBI_DEAL_TYPE

vw_TD_EBI_OPP.description: Opportunity (deal/pipeline) details including stage, partners, competitors, deal scores, and sales execution metadata.

CLOSED_FROM_STAGE.description: stage from which the deal was closed

ORIGINAL_OPP_CREATE_DATE_ID.description: original creation date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

PUSHED_COUNT.description: number of times deal was pushed

DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED.description: days since next steps were updated

vw_TD_EBI_ACCOUNT.description: Account master data — customer profiles, segments, identifiers, health summaries, and DX segmentation.

HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR.description: flag: has active PQ EOQ ARR

vw_EBI_OPG.description: Outlook Product Group (OPG) dimension view. Groups products into hierarchies for reporting across multiple solution taxonomies.

MOPG1.description: Major Outlook Product Group — top-level product grouping

vw_EBI_CALDATE.description: Calendar/date dimension view for fiscal and calendar periods.

DATE_KEY.description: date key (used by all _DATE_ID foreign keys)

FISCAL_YR.description: fiscal year as integer key (Adobe FY starts in December). There is no FISCAL_YR_ID column — use FISCAL_YR.

FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR.description: fiscal year and quarter as integer key (e.g. 20254). There is no FISCAL_QTR_ID column — use FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR.

FISCAL_WEEK_NUMBER_BY_QTR.description: fiscal week number within the quarter

WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE.description: Snapshot week bucket (Snapshot_Week_bkt). Use WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0 for mandatory global filter. In vw_EBI_CALDATE; join from pipeline/quota via SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = DATE_KEY.

WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE_RTB.description: reverse week sort order for RTB

WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE_RTB_Ord.description: reverse week sort ordinal for RTB

WeekNumberNameRTB.description: week number display name for RTB

QTR_BKT_IND.description: quarter bucket indicator (0 = current quarter, 1-4 = future quarters)

vw_ebi_sales_stage.description: Sales stage dimension view. SOURCE OF TRUTH for stage mapping (see business-context). Stage name does NOT equal ID (S4=5, S5=4). When filtering by stage name, join and use s.SALES_STAGE = 'S4'. Full mapping: -1=N/A, 1=Closed - Booked, 2=S7, 3=S6, 4=S5, 5=S4, 6=S3, 7=S2, 8=S1, 9-12=Closed variants. Pipeline = IN (2,3,4,5,6).

SALES_STAGE_ID.description: sales stage identifier (PK). Stage name does NOT equal ID (e.g. S4=5, S5=4). When filtering by stage name, join vw_ebi_sales_stage and use s.SALES_STAGE. Full mapping: -1=N/A, 1=Closed - Booked, 2=S7, 3=S6, 4=S5, 5=S4, 6=S3, 7=S2, 8=S1, 9-12=Closed variants.

SALES_STAGE.description: sales stage name. Possible values: N/A, Closed - Booked, S7, S6, S5, S4, S3, S2, S1, Closed Lost from Pipe, Closed CleanUp from Pipe, Closed Lost from Non Pipe, Closed CleanUp from Non Pipe.

vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage.description: Role coverage dimension view. Maps role coverage assignments to business units and business unit groups for quota and pipeline reporting.

vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE.description: Creator type dimension view. Categorizes who created an opportunity (e.g., Field, Web, Partner).

TD_EBI_DEAL_TYPE.description: Deal type dimension (e.g., New Business, Renewal, Expansion).

TD_EBI_UCP_COMPETITORS.description: Competitor information associated with accounts, sourced from ZoomInfo (Zi) data.

TF_EBI_Marketing_Trend.description: Marketing engagement and trend metrics by account, with score and benchmark breakdowns.

SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID.description: snapshot date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK.description: Pipeline walk analysis — period-over-period pipeline movement tracking current vs previous snapshot values.

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

DEAL_TYPE_ID.description: deal type identifier, links to TD_EBI_DEAL_TYPE

SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID.description: snapshot date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

CLOSE_DATE_ID.description: close date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE

WALK_COMPOSITE_KEY.description: composite key for the walk record

GROSSASV.description: gross ASV amount for the walk

WALK_CATEGORY.description: walk movement category (Added, Pulled In, Pushed Out, Lost, etc.)

GLOBAL_REGION.description: global region; for consistency with region reporting prefer filter values: AMERICAS, EMEA, APAC, WW

TF_EBI_TPT_INFO.description: Territory/account planning team (TPT) information, account tiers, account plans, and pipeline availability flags.

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

IS_PIPE_AT_SUB_MOPG1_CNTRY.description: flag: pipeline at sub + product + country

HAS_PIPE_ARR_RBOB_OPP_TARGET_AT_SUB.description: flag: has pipeline/ARR/RBOB target at sub

HAS_PIPE_ARR_RBOB_OPP_TARGET_AT_PRNT.description: flag: has pipeline/ARR/RBOB target at parent

TD_EBI_CUSTOMER_HEALTH.description: Customer health dimension — health score definitions and tiers across multiple health categories.

vw_TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_SOLUTION_HEALTH_MOVEM.description: Solution-level health score movement over time, tracking health and movement IDs per account/solution.

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

SNAPSHOT_MONTH_ID.description: monthly snapshot date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE.DATE_KEY

AE_REGION_ID.description: AE region identifier, links to vw_td_ebi_region_rpt

HAVE_ACTIVE_PQ_EOQ_ARR.description: flag: has active PQ EOQ ARR

TF_EBI_CUSTOMER_HEALTH.description: Customer health fact — health ratings per account/solution over time with narrative fields.

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

SNAPSHOT_MONTH_ID.description: monthly snapshot date key, links to vw_EBI_CALDATE.DATE_KEY

vw_TD_ICP_UCP_SCORES.description: ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and UCP (Unified Customer Profile) scores with fit ratings and assessment details.

OPG_ID.description: product group identifier, links to vw_EBI_OPG

MOPG1.description: Major Outlook Product Group — top-level product grouping

HIGH_UCP_ICP.description: flag: high UCP or ICP score

HIGH_ICP.description: flag: 1 if ICP score above threshold

HIGH_UCP.description: flag: 1 if UCP score above threshold

HIGH_AES_UCP_OR_ICP.description: flag: high AES with UCP or ICP

HIGH_UCP_OR_ICP.description: flag: high UCP or high ICP

TD_EBI_REPORT_DX_ACCOUNT_PROFILE_OPG.description: DX account profile by OPG — product of interest and MQA flags per subsidiary/parent and product.

SUB_MOPG1_MA.description: subsidiary + product + market area composite key

MAJOR_OPG1.description: Major Outlook Product Group, links to vw_EBI_OPG.MOPG1

PRODUCT_OF_INTEREST_STATUS.description: product of interest status (Hot = high intent)

TD_EBI_COUNTRY.description: Geographic hierarchy dimension table mapping countries to sales organization structure. Provides country-to-region rollup: Country > Sub Market Area > Market Area > Sales Region > GEO. Use this table to resolve country names and geographic hierarchies from COUNTRY_ID or ACCOUNT_COUNTRY_ID foreign keys in fact tables.

COUNTRY_ID.description: unique country identifier, joins to vw_TF_EBI_P2S.ACCOUNT_COUNTRY_ID, TF_EBI_MARKETING_TREND.ACCOUNT_COUNTRY_ID, TF_EBI_TPT_INFO.COUNTRY_ID

COUNTRY_CODE.description: ISO-style two-letter country code (e.g., US, AD, AE)

COUNTRY_NAME.description: full country name (e.g., United Arab Emirates, Andorra)

SALES_REGION_CODE.description: sales region code (e.g., WEU, UKI, RLAN)

SALES_REGION.description: sales region name (e.g., Western Europe, UKI, Latin America)

MARKET_AREA.description: market area name (e.g., Middle East, Iberica, Mediterranean)

SUB_MARKET_AREA.description: sub-market area name (most granular geographic grouping)
